text:
The Crown of Gera (ジェラ３世の王冠, Jera Sansei no Ōkan) is an anime-only artifact that was present in the 1999 anime adaptation of Hunter × Hunter. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 18 (1999) 

Appearance

The semi-spherical crown features rows of pearl-like beads that surround its perimeter both horizontally and vertically. It also has a purple, flower-shaped accent at its top, and a vivid red jewel centered at its front. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

During the treasure hunt in the bonus stage of the 3rd Phase of the Hunter Exam, Hanzo finds this treasure in a sunken ship. According to Kurapika, it belonged to Gera the Third, also known as The Tragic Prince, the king who was lost at sea during his coronation in the 16 th century. Hanzo trades this in exchange for a room with Kurapika. 

 
Crown of Gera HxH99 IMG1.png
Crown of gera.png
Crown of Gera HxH99 IMG2.png
 

Trivia

In the subtitled version of the anime, its name is "crown of Jerra". 

Intertextuality and References

The Crown of Gera design closely resembles the Imperial Crown of Austria, a 17 th century jewel also known as the Crown of Emperor Rudolf II, part of the Austrian Crown Jewels.
